response.original_title: What Happens if I Cancel a Non-Refundable Flight on Lufthansa?
response.overview: Cancelling a "non-refundable" 📞+1 (888)-994-3769(USA/CANADA)  OR 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] [UK]  flight on Lufthansa doesn't necessarily mean you lose 100% of your money. Depending on your fare type 📞+1 (888)-994-3769(USA/CANADA)  OR 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] [UK], the timing of your cancellation, and whether the airline itself disrupts 📞+1 (888)-994-3769(USA/CANADA)  OR 📞+44 [800]~[054]~[8541] [UK]  the flight, you may still be entitled to a significant partial or even full refund.
response.title: What Happens if I Cancel a Non-Refundable Flight on Lufthansa?
